name: Poolsuite
author: poolsuite
tagline: 80s summer vacation simulator. Retro visuals, disco funk, VHS aesthetics. The internet's most stylish pool party.

name: Silk
author: weavesilk
tagline: Interactive generative art. Draw with light and symmetry. Every stroke creates a unique, mesmerizing pattern. Zero skill required.

name: Patatap
author: patatap
tagline: Visual + sound instrument. Tap any key, get a beautiful animation and tone. A portable animation and sound kit in your browser.

name: Window Swap
author: window-swap
tagline: Look out of someone else's window. Real video views from real people around the world. Quiet, beautiful, human.

name: Drive & Listen
author: driveandlisten
tagline: Drive through any city with local radio. Tokyo at night, Paris in the rain, LA at sunset. Just pick a city and go.

name: Radio Garden
author: radio-garden
tagline: Spin the 3D globe and tune into live radio from anywhere on Earth. Thousands of stations, one interactive planet.

name: Character.AI
author: character-ai
tagline: Talk to AI characters with distinct personalities. Philosophers, anime characters, historical figures. Or create your own companion.

name: Slow Roads
author: slow-roads
tagline: Procedurally generated driving game. Endless landscapes, no destination, no score. Just you, the road, and the scenery.

name: Pixelarium
author: pixelarium
tagline: Free online pixel art editor. Create retro-style sprites, animations, and scenes directly in your browser. No install, no account.

name: Moodist
author: moodist
tagline: Open-source ambient sound mixer. Blend rain, cafe chatter, fire crackle. Free, no ads, no account. Just focus.
